fields.name: Assets
fields.description: All assets owned by the business including current and fixed assets.

fields.name: Cash
fields.description: Physical currency and cash equivalents held by the business.

fields.name: Cash on Hand
fields.description: Main cash drawer or register for daily sales and receipts.

fields.name: Petty Cash
fields.description: Small cash fund for minor expenses and incidentals.

fields.name: Bank Accounts
fields.description: Funds held in banks and financial institutions.

fields.name: Commercial Bank - Current Account
fields.description: Main operating bank account for business transactions.

fields.name: Commercial Bank - Savings Account
fields.description: Savings account for reserve funds and interest earnings.

fields.name: Accounts Receivable
fields.description: Amounts owed to the business by customers and others.

fields.name: Trade Receivables
fields.description: Amounts owed by customers for goods or services sold on credit.

fields.name: Other Receivables
fields.description: Non-trade receivables including employee advances and other amounts due.

fields.name: VAT Input (Tax Paid on Purchases)
fields.description: Value Added Tax paid on purchases, offset against VAT collected.

fields.name: Inventory
fields.description: Goods held for resale or used in production.

fields.name: Merchandise Inventory
fields.description: Finished goods available for sale to customers.

fields.name: Raw Materials
fields.description: Materials and supplies used in production or assembly.

fields.name: Work in Progress
fields.description: Partially completed goods in production process.

fields.name: Fixed Assets
fields.description: Long-term tangible property used in business operations.

fields.name: Equipment
fields.description: Machinery, tools, and equipment used in business operations.

fields.name: Vehicles
fields.description: Motor vehicles used for business purposes.

fields.name: Furniture & Fixtures
fields.description: Office furniture, shelving, display cases, and fixtures.

fields.name: Computer Equipment
fields.description: Computers, servers, printers, and technology hardware.

fields.name: Accumulated Depreciation
fields.description: Cumulative depreciation expense on all fixed assets (contra-asset).

fields.name: Liabilities
fields.description: All obligations and amounts owed by the business.

fields.name: Accounts Payable
fields.description: Amounts owed by the business to suppliers and vendors.

fields.name: Trade Payables
fields.description: Amounts owed to suppliers for goods or services purchased on credit.

fields.name: Other Payables
fields.description: Miscellaneous amounts owed not related to trade purchases.

fields.name: VAT Output (Tax Collected on Sales)
fields.description: Value Added Tax collected from customers on sales.

fields.name: Tax Payables
fields.description: Tax obligations owed to government authorities.

fields.name: PAYE Payable
fields.description: Pay As You Earn income tax withheld from employee salaries.

fields.name: Income Tax Payable
fields.description: Corporate or business income tax payable to Inland Revenue.

fields.name: NBT Payable
fields.description: Nation Building Tax payable to government.

fields.name: Statutory Payables
fields.description: Sri Lankan statutory employer obligations.

fields.name: EPF Payable
fields.description: Employees' Provident Fund contributions (employee + employer portions).

fields.name: ETF Payable
fields.description: Employees' Trust Fund contributions (employer portion only).

fields.name: Long-term Liabilities
fields.description: Obligations due beyond one year from the reporting date.

fields.name: Owner's Equity
fields.description: Owner's residual interest in business assets after deducting liabilities.

fields.name: Capital
fields.description: Capital contributed by the owner or shareholders.

fields.name: Retained Earnings
fields.description: Accumulated net profits retained in the business after distributions.

fields.name: Drawings
fields.description: Owner withdrawals from the business (contra-equity).

fields.name: Revenue
fields.description: Income earned from business operations and other sources.

fields.name: Sales Revenue
fields.description: Revenue from the sale of goods and products.

fields.name: Product Sales
fields.description: Revenue from selling merchandise and physical products.

fields.name: Service Sales
fields.description: Revenue from providing services to customers.

fields.name: Service Revenue
fields.description: Revenue from professional and consulting services.

fields.name: Consulting Services
fields.description: Revenue from consulting and advisory services.

fields.name: Professional Services
fields.description: Revenue from professional service engagements.

fields.name: Other Income
fields.description: Non-operating income from miscellaneous sources.

fields.name: Interest Income
fields.description: Interest earned on bank deposits and investments.

fields.name: Miscellaneous Income
fields.description: Other income not classified elsewhere.

fields.name: Expenses
fields.description: All costs incurred to generate revenue and operate the business.

fields.name: Cost of Goods Sold
fields.description: Direct cost of merchandise sold to customers.

fields.name: Personnel Costs
fields.description: Employee compensation and statutory employer contributions.

fields.name: Salaries & Wages
fields.description: Gross salaries and wages paid to employees.

fields.name: EPF Expense (Employer Portion)
fields.description: Employer's contribution to Employees' Provident Fund (12%).

fields.name: ETF Expense (Employer Portion)
fields.description: Employer's contribution to Employees' Trust Fund (3%).

fields.name: Rent Expense
fields.description: Rent paid for business premises.

fields.name: Utilities
fields.description: Utility costs for business operations.

fields.name: Electricity
fields.description: Electricity charges for business premises.

fields.name: Water
fields.description: Water supply charges.

fields.name: Internet & Telephone
fields.description: Internet, telephone, and communication costs.

fields.name: Marketing & Advertising
fields.description: Advertising, promotions, and marketing expenses.

fields.name: Office & Administrative
fields.description: Office supplies, professional fees, and administrative costs.

fields.name: Office Supplies
fields.description: Stationery, printing, and general office supplies.

fields.name: Professional Fees
fields.description: Accounting, legal, and other professional service fees.

fields.name: Insurance
fields.description: Business insurance premiums.

fields.name: Depreciation Expense
fields.description: Depreciation of fixed assets over their useful lives.

fields.name: Financial Costs
fields.description: Bank charges, interest, and financial transaction costs.

fields.name: Bank Charges
fields.description: Bank service fees and transaction charges.

fields.name: Interest Expense
fields.description: Interest paid on loans and credit facilities.

fields.name: Miscellaneous Expenses
fields.description: Other operating expenses not classified elsewhere.
